rows.label: qev040405_MSG0001
rows.name:
Satsu... where are you-mo...
Could it be that you died-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040405_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him that Satsu has been found.

rows.label: qev040405_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that Satsu has gone on a journey.

rows.label: qev040405_MSG0003
rows.name:
Is it okay for such a wonderful thing
to happen in this world-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040405_MSG0004
rows.name:
You don't have to lie-mo.
Mumutsu understands-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040405_MSG0005
rows.name: Satsu has gone to a far, far away world-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040405_MSG0006
rows.name:
It's sad-mo... It's painful-mo...
Living is sad-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040405_MSG0007
rows.name:
If it was going to be like this,
I should have just stayed at the caravan-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040405_MSG0008
rows.name:
...In the end, what Mumutsu did was a wasted effort-mo.
...The world is harsh-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040405_MSG0010
rows.name:
You tricked me-mo!!
...But if Satsu is alive, I'll forgive you-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040405_MSG0011
rows.name: Ahh! The world looks so sparkling-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040405_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hooray! Hooray! Hooray!
Hooray for Nopon!
Hooray for [ST:playername ]-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040405_MSG0013
rows.name:
Being alive is wonderful!!
I'm going to hurry back and see Satsu-mo![ST:wait ]
